title: Is IREN Limited (IREN) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
text:
The article presents a bullish case for IREN Limited, a vertically integrated data center operator combining large-scale data center facilities with access to renewable energy sources, including contracts with BC Hydro and a 750 MW liquid-cooled campus in Texas.

Growth Catalyst: The company is transitioning from Bitcoin mining (over 90% of Q2 2026 revenue) toward AI Cloud services. A major driver is a $9.7 billion agreement with Microsoft involving deployment of 140,000 Nvidia GB300 GPUs, with AI Cloud revenue projected to reach $3.4 billion by 2026.

Competitive Advantage: Power availability becomes a bottleneck, with management highlighting a projected 44 GW supply shortfall over the next three years, providing structural advantages for energy-rich operators.

Risk Factors: Substantial share dilution, rising leverage, and negative free cash flow during heavy capital expenditure phases.

Stock Performance: Since previous coverage in May 2025, IREN's stock price has appreciated by approximately 442.54%. The publication suggests other AI stocks may offer better risk-adjusted returns within shorter timeframes.
